name: rei-eyes-close
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman's eyes closing, lashes lowering. Remembering. Letting herself feel. No longer fighting. Surrender to memory. Soft lighting, intimate. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-silhouette-burn
prompt: Wide shot final. Silver-haired woman silhouetted at large window, alone in dark minimalist room. D-Class Block glowing warm amber in the distance through glass. Cool blue interior, warm amber calling from outside. She's going to burn. End image. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: distant city hum through glass, quiet night, faint warmth lingering
